g.text: ➙ recv: health-check endpoint, global ACL checks, basic normalizations,
➙ deliver/synth: error handling, debug headers, etc.
➙ backend_fetch: request cleanup, ESI announcement, etc.
➙ backend_response: TTL, grace, keep & ESI initialization, Cache-Control
➙ recv: HTTPS redirections, invalidations, store PUT/POST body, return
➙ hash: hash PUT/POST body, custom URL/host hashing
➙ deliver: debug headers, response cleanup, ESI & IMS/INM, counters
➙ backend_response: backend name logging, counters, TTL/grace/keep
limits, lurker-friendly bans, registration of Ykeys,
➙ backend_error: backend name logging, retry requests, revive objects
➙ recv: client IP extraction & server name logging
➙ replication-*.vcl: cache replication strategy to be used
➙ config.vcl: global settings, directors & counters, etc.
